chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 249 - وَ دَخَلَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ اَلْحَمَّامَ فَقَالَ لَهُ صَاحِبُ اَلْحَمَّامِ نُخْلِيهِ لَكَ فَقَالَ «لاَ إِنَّ اَلْمُؤْمِنَ خَفِيفُ اَلْمَئُونَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.249 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) entered the bathhouse, the bathhouse attendant offered to clear it for him. Imam (as) said: 'No, a believer is light in their burdens.’
